name: Helm of the Scavenger
description:
This ornate chair is designed to propel and maneuver a ship through space.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Passive Properties", "entries": ["The following properties of the helm come into play even when no creature is attuned to it:", {"type": "list", "items": ["When placed aboard a vessel weighing between 1 and 100 tons, the helm generates an envelope of fresh air around the ship while it is in the void of space (but not underwater).
